==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{BroadcasterCard
|b1=SardarjiYT
|b2=Insane Arena
|b3=Gamezo Tech 
}}

===Format===
* '''Lidoma Masters Showdown''' - ''March 11th - 19th
** 27 teams
** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}
* '''Semi Finals''' - ''March 11th - 14th 
** 27 teams
*** 23 invited teams
*** 4 qualified teams
** 4 matchdays
** 6 matches per day
** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 9 teams.
** Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals''' - ''March 16th - 19th
** 16 teams
** 4 matchdays
** 6 matches per day
